name: my-mind-node-smoke
description: Minimal harness smoke suite for workspace quality and playground readiness.

commands.name: architecture lint
commands.purpose: Validate dependency layers and harness documentation contracts.

commands.name: typecheck
commands.purpose: Validate TypeScript package and playground contracts.

commands.name: unit and metadata tests
commands.purpose: Run package metadata tests, package unit tests, and benchmark generation.

commands.name: build
commands.purpose: Build packages, playground, and VitePress docs.

commands.name: bundle budget
commands.purpose: Check gzip budgets after build artifacts exist.
